name: Curried Tuna Salad in Red Pepper
recipeIngredient: 3 1/4 ounces Chunk light tuna, packed in water or oil, drained and slightly mashed
1 2-inch piece of cucumber, preferably English hot-house, peeled -- and cut into fine dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the top of the red pepper about one-third of the way down.
2. Remove the seeds and membranes from both the top and bottom, and the stem from the top.
3. Finely dice the top and put it in a medium-size bowl.
4. Add the tuna, garbanzo beans, cucumber, currants, almonds, and scallions to the bowl, and toss gently.
5. Combine the yogurt with the curry and ginger, and mix it with the tuna salad.
6. Spoon the tuna back into the red pepper before serving.
